scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:generate -w apps/api && npm run db:migrate -w apps/api && npm run db:seed -w apps/api
scripts.quiz:sanitize-db: npm run db:generate -w apps/api && npx tsx apps/api/scripts/sanitize-quiz-db.ts
scripts.trash:sync-db: npm run db:generate -w apps/api && npx tsx apps/api/scripts/sync-trash-manifest.ts
scripts.assets:transparent: node scripts/remove-white-bg.mjs apps/web/public/assets/items/huu-co && node scripts/remove-white-bg.mjs apps/web/public/assets/items/tai-che && node scripts/remove-white-bg.mjs apps/web/public/assets/items/khac && node scripts/remove-white-bg.mjs apps/web/public/assets/bins
